name: selat
description: Discover and call paid AI capabilities via a two-tier loop — vetted multi-step skills first, then a federated x402 / MPP endpoint catalog (image/video/audio generation, translation, web scraping, data enrichment, real-time data, on-chain actions). Payments settle from your own Circle Agent Wallet (MPC self-custody — SELAT never holds your keys or funds). Wraps the published @selat-ai/selat-cli and ships the 'selat-discovery' driver skill.

interface.shortDescription: Find vetted skills and pay for x402/MPP capabilities from any agent — self-custody.
interface.longDescription: SELAT is a two-tier capability layer for AI agents. It first checks vetted, evaluated multi-step skills (SELAT-AI/selat-skills), then falls back to a federated x402 / MPP endpoint catalog (Circle + Agentic Market + MPP merged) — image/video/audio generation, translation, web scraping, data enrichment, real-time data, on-chain actions. Payments settle per use from your own Circle Agent Wallet (MPC self-custody): SELAT never sees a private key or holds your funding balance. No per-service signup.
